**NEW HAMPSHIRE REPUBLICAN PARTY**
**WEEKLY NEWSLETTER** FRIDAY, July 14th |
---|---|---
---
---
---
| | _**A Note From Jeanie**_ | |
---
| Dear Derek,
As we get closer to the upcoming special elections, the New Hampshire Republican Party is working hard every day to secure Republican victories for our candidates. We just had a great house party for Mike Feeley, our candidate in the Concord Special Election for State Representative on July 18. When Republicans get out and vote, Republicans win!
We are also focused on making sure David Boutin has the support needed to win in his special election on July 25. We have been hitting doors, making phone calls, and reaching out to voters in the district to ensure supporters get out and vote.
In order to secure a victory in upcoming elections, we need your help. Please sign up to volunteer here: [http://nh.gop/special-election-volunteering/](http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=5MdO6cLza2MazVJVOHyurkd4UzRFDwnUSlfHiLVwfpBRRj4XBr8rQS6IbhP1EDK7sBTZzu5rcYeHqhehxlzElg-3D-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30MLYMTxjj0UZs7lllvnEktloFAyDCsL6AopgX-2FYecBs3LfMocJ4z2647ll4coVSRxlTQCRfpq9QI-2FtMVc7Cj1eazo-2BCnzWGKhpB-2BVrOLs6nSRzNrL4WHGRWkaUDDUH2VUoUKWEtTfA265W8-2BX1FilGNbOLgnGT9WlXgdEJORRDVtb0l1DmrFaYYiUQytceJPb-2Fpd-2BWCH2Hgxm2x0WOIG7CUgKnUIBvlC534c7ccjMdz8kgFWmHXHWEqiLseFMEOInEvgfkMxXiK9N4n4tuhuT-2B0A-3D-3D)

clean_body: | | | NEW HAMPSHIRE REPUBLICAN PARTY WEEKLY NEWSLETTER FRIDAY, July 14th | ---|---|--- | | A Note From Jeanie | | | Dear Derek, As we get closer to the upcoming special elections, the New Hampshire Republican Party is working hard every day to secure Republican victories for our candidates. We just had a great house party for Mike Feeley, our candidate in the Concord Special Election for State Representative on July 18. When Republicans get out and vote, Republicans win! We are also focused on making sure David Boutin has the support needed to win in his special election on July 25. We have been hitting doors, making phone calls, and reaching out to voters in the district to ensure supporters get out and vote. In order to secure a victory in upcoming elections, we need your help. Please sign up to volunteer here: Sincerely, Jeanie | | | Join the Grassroots Circle! | | The Grassroots Circle is a unique way for you to get involved while supporting the Party. Becoming a member couldn't be easier -- join today for as little as $10 per month. There are three levels of support: The Grassroots Supporter, the NHGOP Advocate and the VIP Investor. | | | | Intern with the NH GOP! | | Are you a student or know a student that is interested in Politics? Learn the skills necessary to win elections and meet the Republican leaders that govern our State and write legislation. | | | Featured Event | ---|---|--- | Upcoming Events | ---|---|--- | Coos County Republican Party Meeting Northland Dairy Bar in Berlin July 20 @ 7:00 pm NHYR Summer Party Strange Brew Tavern in Manchester July 26 @ 6:00 pm | | | | | | Photo of the Week | ---|---|--- Governor Chris Sununu, NH GOP Jeanie Forrester, and Republican Candidate for the NH House Michael Feeley at a great house party in Concord on Tuesday! | Republican Spotlight! | ---|---|--- | Thank you for all of your submissions! This week's spotlight shines recognizes the late Representative Ron Belanger. Representative Belanger served the people of Salem in the New Hampshire House and as a Selectman and Planning Board member. Representative Belanger will always be remembered for his dedicated service and commitment to improving the community he loved. name: Joe Donnelly
subject: Add your name: Protect voting rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
|
---
[](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c268c/7377f838/36e3f50d/51fb3c87/1947557224/VEsH/ "http://www.joeforindiana.com/")

| | Peter,

Four years ago last month, the Supreme Court struck a devastating blow to the Voting Rights Act by invalidating key parts of the landmark civil rights law.

Since then, Republican governors and state legislators across the country have taken advantage of that decision and enacted laws that restrict voting. **The facts are in: these laws have suppressed the vote of certain communities, such as seniors, people of color, and students.**

It's not just unfair -- it goes against what our democracy stands for. That's why I'm speaking out and reaffirming my support for the Voting Rights Advancement Act, which would restore critical portions of the Voting Rights Act and and reduce unfair barriers to voting. We ought to be expanding ballot access, not going backwards.

**[I need you with me, Peter. Click here to call on Congress to restore the vital protections of the Voting Rights Act. Add your name today.](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c268c/7377f838/36e3f50d/51fb3c86/1947557224/VEsE/ "https://donnelly.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/jdvrab")**

In 2015, I visited Selma, Alabama, to commemorate the 50th anniversary of the brutal assault on civil rights demonstrators that spurred the passage of the Voting Rights Act. Their heroic sacrifice should never be forgotten, and that means working tirelessly to oppose any measure that curtails the right to cast a ballot.

The Supreme Court's decision to gut the Voting Rights Act opened the door to discriminatory policies that make it harder for many Americans to exercise their right to vote, leaving it up to Congress to restore these vital protections.

The Voting Rights Advancement Act would do just that by restoring the requirement that jurisdictions with a history of voter suppression get approval from the Justice Department before making changes to their voting procedures -- a requirement that exists to stop disenfranchisement before it's written into law.

**I have always believed that the right to cast a ballot is one of the most sacred promises of our democracy, and we must defend it for everyone.**

**[Join the fight: Add your name to stand with me for a restored Voting Rights Act.](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c268c/7377f838/36e3f50d/51fb3c86/1947557224/VEsF/ "https://donnelly.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/jdvrab")**

Thank you,

Joe **** **** **** **** | [**CONTRIBUTE**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c268c/7377f838/36e3f50d/51fb3c81/1947557224/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jd-donate?refcode=20170715dbb&amount=25")
